title: Korak 35

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
text = 'Hello World'
shift = 3
alphabet = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'

for char in text.lower():
    index = alphabet.find(char)
    print(char, index)
    new_index = index + shift
    new_char = alphabet[new_index]
    print(new_char)
challengeFiles.seed:
text = 'Hello World'
shift = 3
alphabet = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'

for char in text.lower():
    index = alphabet.find(char)
    print(char, index)
    new_index = index + shift
    new_char = alphabet[new_index]
    print(new_char)

tests.text: Ne bi trebalo da imaš print(char, index) u svom kodu.
Treba da promeniš print(new_char) u print('char:', char, 'new char:', new_char).
Vaš kod ima netačnu sintaksu i/ili nevažeću referencu.

description: Očisti rezultate. Izbriši print(char, index), i zamijeni zadnji poziv od print() u print('char:', char, 'new char:', new_char).
